narrative:
Lancaster City 5-B (precinct in Fairfield County) has 795 registered voters, with 65.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
